markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the SchoolAI \<\> GrowthX partnership and align on future needs.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategic Misalignment:** The partnership is misaligned with SchoolAI's 3x business growth goal. The current content-only focus fails to address critical gaps in technical SEO, AI/LLM visibility, and revenue-driven strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Cost Inefficiency:** The engagement is perceived as expensive, especially compared to competitor quotes under $100k/year that include detailed briefs for SchoolAI's internal SMEs to write.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [**Critical Technical Need:** An upcoming site migration from Framer to Webflow requires deep technical SEO expertise to fix existing site debt and ensure a successful transition.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [**Urgent Decision:** SchoolAI is actively evaluating new partners and will make a final decision with its CRO by the end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Misalignment & Performance Gaps

  - [SchoolAI's 3x business growth goal for 2026 requires a performance-focused SEO partner with a revenue lens, which GrowthX is not currently providing.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [**Core Gaps Identified:**](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
      - [**Technical SEO:** No support for site-wide technical issues.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [**Off-Page SEO:** No strategy for link building or authority.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [**AI/LLM Visibility:** No clear strategy to win in AI search, a key competitive area where SchoolAI has fallen behind.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [**Traffic vs. Revenue:** The current focus on traffic is misaligned with business goals.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
      - [**Example:** A top-ranking article on "AI math tools" attracts high traffic but also a high volume of non-decision-makers, diluting its strategic value.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)

### Cost & Service Model

  - [The current engagement is perceived as expensive compared to competitor quotes, which are all under $100k/year.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
  - [Competitor models offer a more cost-efficient approach:](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
      - [They provide detailed content briefs.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
      - [SchoolAI's internal SMEs (former educators) then write the content, leveraging their deep subject matter expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [GrowthX's base rate (\~$12k/month) is above this threshold, reflecting a full-service model that includes content writing and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)

### Critical Technical Need: Site Migration

  - [SchoolAI plans to migrate its site from Framer back to Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [This requires significant technical SEO expertise to:](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
      - [Address existing site debt from a previous messy import.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
      - [Ensure a clean, SEO-optimized migration.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)

### GrowthX's Response & Path Forward

  - [Kyle Gaudreau acknowledged the strategic misalignment as a GrowthX miss, attributing it to:](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [**Initial Scope:** The engagement was originally scoped for complex programmatic SEO, leading to a higher price. When that plan shifted, the scope was filled with high-volume editorial content to match the price, rather than being reset.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [**Onboarding Process:** The current "strategy sprint" onboarding was not in place at the time, which would have better aligned the strategy with business goals from the start.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [GrowthX confirmed it has the technical SEO expertise for the migration and can reset the strategy to be more performance-focused.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Kyle will discuss internally to determine if a proposal can be created that meets SchoolAI's needs and budget.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:** Discuss internally to determine if a revised proposal is feasible.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Submit a proposal by the end of next week if a viable path forward is identified.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [**SchoolAI:** Make a final decision on an SEO partner with its CRO by the end of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/YjTXXsjjGNud6fCm_7mt4gty1BTKjmPr?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
